source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The \%yield of ammonia as a function of time in the reaction N_2(g) + 3H_2(g) \rightleftharpoons 2NH_3(g), \Delta H < 0 at (P, T_1) is given below. If this reaction is conducted at (P, T_2), with T_2 > T_1, the \%yield of ammonia as a function of time is represented by <image_1> <image_2>

image_dependency: Question asks which graph represents % yield versus time at a different temperature, so the correct answer depends on interpreting plotted curves.
Input explicitly marks requires_image=true and text_dominant=false.
Options are only labels (A/B/C/D) without textual descriptions, so the image is necessary to distinguish choices.
multi_step: Solving requires combining chemical equilibrium knowledge for an exothermic reaction (higher temperature lowers equilibrium ammonia yield) with time-course/graph interpretation.
The task likely involves reasoning about both final yield and how the curve changes over time, not just recalling a single fact.
Multiple-choice format keeps the reasoning bounded, so complexity is moderate rather than maximal.
verifiability: Answer format is a single option label ('B'), which is easy to compare against a gold answer.
asset_registry_record shows answer_present=true, answer_type=choice, and registry_passed=true.
Verifiability is reduced because option text is unavailable and the registry notes a mismatch between referenced image placeholders and provided image assets.
